pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Study of strictly causal eval-time n-gram caching that blends cached counts with LM logits, exposing inflated scores and prompting cache-size/distribution rules.
techniques: Strictly causal n-gram cache blending stored ratios with LM logits
Global all-reduce sync of cache state to close shared statistics gaps
Hash-bucket sweep exposing collision-driven probability inflation
